page.title: Alerts & Notifications
page.subtitle: Instant notifications for assignments, shift changes, updates, and emergency on-call shifts

exchange.title: New shift exchange request
exchange.message: {{requester}} sent you a shift exchange request.

replace.title: New shift replacement request
replace.message: {{requester}} asked you to cover a shift.

exchange.title: Exchange request awaiting approval
exchange.message: {{recipient}} accepted the request. It is now waiting for administrator approval.

replace.title: Replacement request awaiting approval
replace.message: {{recipient}} accepted the request. It is now waiting for administrator approval.

exchange.title: Exchange request approved
exchange.message: The administrator approved the request and the published schedule was updated.

replace.title: Replacement request approved
replace.message: The administrator approved the request and the published schedule was updated.

exchange.title: Exchange request declined by administrator
exchange.message: The administrator did not approve this request. Reason: {{adminRejectionReason}}.

replace.title: Replacement request declined by administrator
replace.message: The administrator did not approve this request. Reason: {{adminRejectionReason}}.

exchange.title: Exchange request is no longer valid
exchange.message: The shift changed or another request was approved first.

replace.title: Replacement request is no longer valid
replace.message: The shift changed or another request was approved first.

exchange.title: Exchange request expired
exchange.message: The shift started before the approval flow was completed.

replace.title: Replacement request expired
replace.message: The shift started before the approval flow was completed.

notif-1.title: On-Call Assignment
notif-1.message: You have been assigned an on-call shift next Thursday

notif-2.title: Shift Change
notif-2.message: Your shift was changed from evening to Day Shift on Sunday

notif-3.title: Overtime
notif-3.message: You have been assigned overtime on Saturday from 3:00 PM to 7:00 PM

notif-4.title: Schedule Published
notif-4.message: The July 2026 schedule has been published

notif-5.title: Shift Change
notif-5.message: Your shift was changed from night to evening on Tuesday

notif-6.title: System Update
notif-6.message: The scheduling system has been updated. Please review your new schedule
